svg.title: STIP × CPDash — 6-layer architecture
svg.desc: CustomerMaster derives a Customer Segment Set used to filter both STIP and CPDash facts independently. Each is aggregated to the same grain, KPIs are calculated on CPDash, then all three join into a single flat consumption view.
svg.text: STIP agg + CPDash KPIs + Material dim · single flat dataset
SoldTo used for upstream filtering only — removed before aggregation
